It is with a heavy heart that I’m writing this message. The last year has been an extremely difficult one for me personally. Due to the worldwide pandemic, I was unable to see my children. Unfortunately due to the ongoing restrictions and the fact that we will have to relocate to the US again for several months (at least) will be no different. The separation is too big of a strain for me and my kids. Therefore, it is with much sadness that I must take the decision to return to London and leave CF Montréal. I would like to thank the fans, players and all the staff of this football club that have made me feel so welcome. I would also like to thank Kevin Gilmore, Olivier Renard and of course Joey and all of the Saputo family for giving me this wonderful opportunity. We had an impossible year together and to make the playoffs with this group of people is an experience that I will never forget. Thank you all for being there on this journey and I wish you all the success for the future. @clubdefootmtl

I would like to thank the fans, players and all the staff of this football club that have made me feel so welcome. I would also like to thank Kevin Gilmore, Olivier Renard and of course Joey and all of the Saputo family for giving me this wonderful opportunity. 反差萌！拉卡錫迪設計波砵勁可愛


【Now Sports】一眾球星們參與自己設計波砵的藝術計劃，阿仙奴悍將拉卡錫迪展示自己的設計時卻表現了赤子童心。
看圖就知道拉卡錫迪（Alexandre Lacazette）的設計是以卡通人物「小黃人」為主角，藍色的底色襯上一臉輕佻的小黃人公仔，有著強烈色彩對比之餘，與設計者拉卡錫迪的剛強外型亦有極大反差。而另一個重點則在波砵內側，上面印有「Trust the Process（堅信過程）」的字眼。這句語句是NBA費城76人的經典金句，亦呼應了拉卡錫迪身為76人支持者的身份。他與基沙文多年前曾一起觀看費城76人於倫敦上演的比賽，成為一時佳話。

同時參與的球員不在少數，如曼聯的馬迪就將象徵自己效力球會的紅色魔鬼圖案印在波砵之上，紅黑撞色既經典又搶眼；羅馬前鋒迪斯高更將自己的面容繪在波砵上面，襯以黃白藍的色彩；阿仙奴的奧巴美揚就向一套英雄電影致敬，創作以「加蓬黑豹」為主題的波砵。
